_readme: Upcoming events shown on the home page and the Calendar page.
Edited by hand (box office) until Ludus embed/API access exists.
Each event needs: title, date (YYYY-MM-DD, used for sorting and for
dropping past events automatically), and url (the Ludus event page).
Optional: time (e.g. '7:00 PM'), presenter (who's putting it on), and
dateLabel (display text that overrides the formatted date, for runs
like 'July 18-20'). Keys starting with _ are ignored by the site.
If this list is empty or unreachable, the pages simply fall back to
the 'browse events on our ticketing site' link - nothing breaks.
